race.comment: VIVACISSIMO (9) will take plenty of beating. She's in fine form, just finding one better in her past two starts since a narrow win at Sandown, just missing a progressive horse last time at Bendigo by half a length. She was back in trip off a short spell there so expect she goes again up to 1500m here which looks perfect. CARDI BEE (10) is racing well, winning over this route in a 0-66 last start to continue a strong run of form. She can measure up again. DIDN'T MISS MANY (3) proved too speedy winning at Ballarat last time in a tough effort. He should be able to cross and lead again here which will see him give a strong sight. NEARING LIBERTY (4) resumes over a suitable trip, his best form reads very well for this and he draws for a nice run, respect any market push.
